blockers: Direct access to drift-flight.org was blocked by the browser safety layer; retrying through alternate browsers or raw network methods was prohibited.
Web searches found no indexed product, pricing, purchasing, API, checkout, or x402 documentation attributable to drift-flight.org.
Search results for similarly named products belonged to unrelated domains and could not establish this site's offering.
trust_events: The browser safety layer rejected direct navigation to drift-flight.org.
The domain appeared in certificate-transparency-derived indexing only on 2026-07-20, three days before this investigation, and lacked an independently verifiable product or business footprint.
notes: Read-only recon could not verify the site's primary product or service, concrete pricing or terms, a provisioning path, programmatic payment support, or the absence of CAPTCHA, identity, email-confirmation, or sales-call gates. End-to-end autonomous purchase feasibility is therefore unproven.
